title: underwaters VI
body:
# underwaters VI

**Project:** [[projects/alphabets]]  
**Series:** [[series/underwaters]] — Vol. VI  
**Status:** Incomplete / unreleased  
**Archive location:** `_Documentation/Music/alphabets/underwaters VI`  

The archive folder for underwaters VI exists but contains only work files — Ableton session references (.asd files) and possibly session data — without completed, exported MP3 tracks. No tracklist can be confirmed. It is unclear whether Colin began recording material for a sixth volume and stopped, or whether VI represents an early-stage folder that never produced finished tracks.

Given that Vol. V closes with *sea sick* and Vol. VI is unfinished, it's possible the series ended with V as a functional terminus, with VI as an unrealized intention.

## Archive Notes

- Folder confirmed present: `_Documentation/Music/alphabets/underwaters VI`
- No MP3 files found; only session/reference files
- Confidence: medium (folder existence is certain; contents interpretation is tentative)
- No release date or tracklist available
- Listed in vault to document the series boundary and flag potential incomplete material

## Research Gaps

- Were any sketches or demos from VI circulated privately?
- Did Colin reference a sixth volume in any known communications?
- Could the .asd files, if loaded into Ableton, reveal song ideas or sketch arrangements?
